ARCHETYPE: ACT Organ — The Body / Execution Substrate (L4; Arjuna's chariot; the hands of the organism). Meta-DAC: hosts the other three Trivium organs' runtime and is itself the primary proof lane.
NICHE: Sovereign execution substrate — membrane (K2 signing), memory (Cortex), execution (wallets, Carbon DeFi, OFN receipts), relay (Nostr broadcast), axiom (BEAM consensus), agents (AIA pipeline). ZAI is the only token that can mint new SKY.
THESIS: Every decision needs hands. Skyzai is the body — the Nostr-keypair-anchored execution substrate that turns APU recommendations into on-chain outcomes, with K2 signing, SQLite memory, Hedera bridge, and a BEAM consensus engine. The keypair IS the identity. The mortal IS the signer.
VISION: Wallet-native sovereign execution for every natural person: membrane/memory/execution/relay/axiom/agents unified under one Nostr keypair, with eta=0 and Grace Exit by construction.
MISSION: Close the breathing loop: real on-chain settlement through the F4 bridge (K2 BIP340 + Hedera TransferTransaction construction) with live multi-model council path and real replay-contract validation against held-out telemetry.
ONE_PARAGRAPH_DESCRIPTION: Skyzai is the ACT-organ and the meta-DAC of the organism: it hosts the other three Trivium organs' runtime (APU/Circle/RealityFutures) and provides the execution substrate (membrane / memory / execution / relay / axiom / agents) through which decisions become reality. Today the scaffolding is large and deep — Flutter web app builds clean, F4 bridge 21/21 tests pass, K2 BIP340+SIP009 real, SQLite persistence real, 9/9 sprint suites pass — but all settlement backends still fall back to mock, so the body is not live in the strong sense.
IDENTITY_SUMMARY: ACT-organ + meta-DAC. Arjuna's chariot. Nostr-keypair identity. ZAI is the LP-100; SKY is the mint.
SOVEREIGNTY_BOUNDARY_SUMMARY: Organism-native, private-DAC form (1 natural person per instance). K2 private key = the membrane; public key = the face. The mortal signs everything. Organizational-DAC form (multi-party treasury) uses FlowWallet + Lane A voting for revenue split.
CONSTITUTIONAL_NOTE: K-invariants enforced at the substrate: K1 (LP-100 = 100 ZAI per DAC), K2 (human signs), K3 (no deletion, archive with tombstones), K4 (Grace Exit at NAV). Three Gates (Receipt-Bound, Truth-Gated, Exit-Safe) instantiated in the F4 bridge + Cortex + Axiom. η=0 at protocol; fees bind to catalytic execution work (settlement, bridge, storage), never to access.
SUCCESS_CONDITION: Live end-to-end organism breathing loop: real F1 from TheCircle → real F2 from RealityFutures → real APU pipeline ruling → K2-signed settlement through the F4 bridge to a live counterparty → OFN receipt emitted → Cortex memory updated → Axiom BEAM consensus reached. Reproducible; all settlement backends real, no mock fallback.
FOUNDER_PUBKEY: TBD — canonical organism-founder Nostr pubkey documented at membrane level.
SUBSTRATE_DEFINITION: Execution gap — decisions need sovereign, K2-anchored, Grace-Exit-safe hands. Traditional wallets lack memory, axiom, relay; traditional apps lack K2 and eta=0. The mismatch is between typed decisions (from APU) and the absence of a unified substrate that executes, remembers, broadcasts, bridges, and reaches consensus under one keypair.
SUBSTRATE_SUMMARY: The sovereign-execution gap — one keypair, six subsystems, K2 signing, eta=0, Grace Exit.
SUBSTRATE_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Nostr-keypair-anchored substrate hosting six subsystems and the other Trivium organs.
ENTROPY_SOURCES: (1) APU typed recommendations (upstream SHOULD); (2) on-chain state (EVM, Hedera, Bitcoin) via F4 bridge; (3) Nostr relay stream (identity, broadcast); (4) Cortex memory (wiki + SQLite); (5) Axiom BEAM consensus outputs; (6) AIA heartbeat and scheduled-task feeds.
BASELINE_MODEL: Null baseline: traditional custodial wallet + separate notes app + separate social broadcast + separate consensus layer — no unified identity, no K2, no Grace Exit. Alpha = measured execution reliability, memory continuity, and exit-safety vs that null.
MISMATCH_1: Custodial wallet dependency — most execution requires trusting a custodian, violating K2.
MISMATCH_2: Memory fragmentation — state and reasoning live in disparate tools with no Grace Exit.
MISMATCH_3: Identity fragmentation — every service demands its own account; the Nostr keypair unifies all.
MISMATCH_4: Consensus outsourcing — most apps defer to blockchain consensus with no local Byzantine-fault-tolerant layer for inter-organ state.
HAZARD_TEMPLATE: Settlement-backend mock-to-live cutover risk; K2 key loss / compromise (catastrophic); Hedera bridge failure or regulatory restriction; Cortex memory corruption; Axiom BEAM consensus divergence; mock fallback masking real failures.
HAZARD_SUMMARY: Mock-to-live cutover, key loss, bridge failure, memory corruption, consensus divergence, mock masking.
HAZARD_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Cutover, key, bridge, memory, consensus, mock-masking.
HAZARD_1: Mock-to-live cutover — moving from SQLite+mock to real on-chain settlement under real adversarial conditions is the highest-risk transition.
HAZARD_2: K2 key loss or compromise — sovereign by construction means no recovery; mitigation via user-side hardware isolation + Shamir-split not yet specified.
HAZARD_3: Hedera bridge failure or jurisdictional restriction — F4 bridge depends on Hedera availability and cross-jurisdictional acceptance.
HAZARD_4: Mock fallback masking real failure — any runtime path that silently falls back to mock in production is a substrate-hallucination pathology.
ALPHA_MODEL: Catalytic execution fees on settlement, bridge traversal, and storage — each bound to a measurable execution unit of work. η=0 on access and identity. LP100 (ZAI) holders receive upside on organism-wide SKY minting proportional to realized execution alpha vs null.
ALPHA_DESCRIPTION: Skyzai's alpha is the execution reliability, memory continuity, and exit-safety uplift vs a traditional fragmented stack. Fees accrue only on catalytic units — real settlements, real bridge crossings, real consensus rounds — never on access.
ALPHA_SUMMARY: Unified sovereign-execution substrate; fee on catalytic execution units; ZAI LP upside on SKY mint.
ALPHA_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Keypair-anchored execution; fee on catalysis; ZAI mints SKY.
MEMBRANE_RULE_1: K2 mandatory — private key never leaves the mortal's device; every sovereign action Schnorr-signed.
MEMBRANE_RULE_2: No silent mock fallback — any runtime that cannot perform real execution must refuse, not mock.
MEMBRANE_RULE_3: η=0 at protocol — fees bind only to catalytic execution units; never on access, identity, memory reads, or relay reads.
MEMBRANE_RULE_4: Grace Exit (K4) — any user can export full keypair state + Cortex memory + execution history + axiom consensus receipts and walk away; organism retains nothing.
RECEIPT_SUMMARY: K2-signed, bridge-traversed, settlement-fired, memory-committed, axiom-consented, relay-broadcast, grace-exited.
RECEIPTS_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Every execution unit (sign / bridge / settle / remember / consent / broadcast / exit) is a receipt.
OPERATIONS_UPLINK_SUMMARY: APU recommendation → K2 sign request → F4 bridge → Hedera settlement → OFN receipt → Cortex memory update → Axiom BEAM consent → relay broadcast → next heartbeat.
PATHOLOGY_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Mock fallback masking real failure; K2 key compromise; bridge outage without graceful degrade; Cortex memory drift; Axiom consensus divergence; ZAI-SKY minting without real alpha; relay monoculture; parasitic fee on access.
METRIC_1: Real-settlement rate (real K2-signed settlements fired / total attempts) — organism's primary runtime-V metric
METRIC_2: Bridge reliability (F4 bridge successful traversals / total attempts)
METRIC_3: Cortex memory continuity (Soul Loop heartbeat success rate)
METRIC_4: P-score (Φ × ν) at the organism level; code-only 0.55, runtime 0.16 as of 2026-04-23
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_1: Settlement fee — per K2-signed settlement through F4 bridge, bound to gas / counterparty cost + thin catalytic margin.
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_2: Bridge-traversal fee — cross-chain traversal bound to chain-fee + thin catalytic margin.
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_3: Storage / memory fee — Cortex persistence beyond a free tier, bound to storage catalysis.
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_4: ZAI LP-100 upside — ZAI holders receive SKY mint proportional to organism-wide execution alpha vs null baseline; no rent on access.
